summary: The user sought advice on establishing a consistent morning routine and overcoming the habit of hitting the snooze button. They decided to try a bodyweight circuit workout and prepare oatmeal with banana and honey the night before for breakfast, while also exploring ways to make their morning routine more enjoyable and effective.
facts: The user wakes up consistently at 6:30 am but struggles to get out of bed due to hitting the snooze button. The user has experience with push-ups and squats and plans to try a bodyweight circuit workout in the morning. The user has been having oatmeal with banana and honey for breakfast lately. The user intends to prepare breakfast the night before to save time in the morning. The user is looking for tips to stay on track with their morning routine and make it more enjoyable.
